title: Gemini 1.5 technical report
goal: Find the Gemini 1.5 technical report and report the context window size.
final_answer: Gemini Team, Google (2024). 'Gemini 1.5: Unlocking Multimodal Understanding Across Millions of Tokens of Context.' arXiv:2403.05530. Gemini 1.5 Pro supports a 1M-token context window (with 2M in preview for 1.5 Flash), the longest of any production model at release.
